chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rights of the Animal Upon Its Owner

text: 2470 - وَ قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «إِنَّ اَلدَّوَابَّ إِذَا لُعِنَتْ لَزِمَتْهَا اَللَّعْنَةُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2470 - The Prophet (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"When animals are cursed, the curse clings to them."
